name: Green Beans with Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the green beans in a saucepan containing boiling salted water.
2. Add salt and sugar to the water.
3. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes. Drain the beans.
4. In a separate pan, sauté the mushrooms in butter until they are heated through.
5. Add the sautéed mushrooms to the drained green beans.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
